title: Phase 4: Engine primitives + rule interpreter until 68/68 goldens pass
description: Data-driven rule interpreter per docs/04-scoring-engine.md: ~15 math primitives, dispatch loop over ToolRule/PackageRule/ProfileRule/InsightRule data, gender-split PZSD norms, scopes mcs/pro.person|role|org/insights/reflections. Done when all 68 golden masters reproduce exactly.
notes: Terminology correction (2026-07-10): the close reason above says 'PROD 3.5 config' — that's legacy vendor branding. Corrected framing: the engine implements all 26 primitives the current live product (ProductCatalog code VC18) invokes; no product name is hardcoded in the engine (see ProductCatalog.php, docs/04, docs/07).
close_reason: Engine ported: data-driven interpreter (RuleInterpreter + LegacyConfig + SessionState + ResultAssembler) implementing all 26 primitives the live PROD 3.5 config invokes. 68/68 golden masters reproduce exactly in BOTH keys and strings formats (goldens:verify + GoldenMasterTest). Legacy quirks preserved and documented in CLAUDE-NOTES.

title: Phase 3: Golden-master test harness (build BEFORE engine)
description: Replay harness for the 68 golden sessions in platform/restore-db/goldens/ per docs/10-verification.md. Diffs engine output vs legacy results_keys/strings.json + outstrings.csv. Goldens contain PII - never committed.
close_reason: goldens:verify command + GoldenMaster PHPUnit suite: finds all 68 sessions, per-session/per-field diff vs results_keys.json, points at legacy outstrings.csv on mismatch, exit-code gated. Reports SKIP until engine (phase 4) exists.

title: De-brand codebase: remove TAI/PRO-D references, add ProductCatalog
description: TAI is the legacy vendor that owned the IP; PRO-D/Professional Development was one of their report products. Neither should be baked into the new engine's naming, schema, or docs (historical exploration docs/notes are exempt). Also: engine was hardcoded to one product/version-bundle — added ProductCatalog so the product is an access-code catalog entry with support for multiple royalty terms per code (docs/07).
acceptance_criteria: taicode/ renamed to platform/; no TAI/PROD branding in api/, README, compose, CI, or forward-looking docs; engine takes a productCode param instead of hardcoded version constants; 68/68 goldens still pass on both sqlite and MySQL.
close_reason: taicode/ renamed to platform/ (git mv, history preserved) incl. superseded spec file rename; all TAI/PRO-D branding scrubbed from api/, README, compose.yaml, CI, and forward-looking docs (historical exploration docs/notes and the frozen superseded spec are exempt, per instruction). Introduced ProductCatalog: engine takes a productCode param instead of hardcoded version constants, catalog supports multiple royalty terms per code (docs/07 updated). 68/68 goldens re-verified on both sqlite and renamed MySQL instance after the refactor.

title: Phase 5: API layer + access codes
description: Endpoints per docs/05-api-design.md (sync scoring default, optional webhooks, OpenAPI 3.1) + access-code/royalty metering per docs/07 (training/bizdev/derivative code types; Stripe later).

title: Phase 2: Migration seeds from restore-db/extracted CSVs
description: Migrations + seeders loading rule/matrix/norm/config data from platform/restore-db/extracted/*.csv (pipe-delimited). Per docs/01 + docs/04. Seed data itself stays out of git.
close_reason: legacy:import artisan command: 76 config tables / 53,518 rows from restore-db/extracted, schema inferred, legacy names verbatim, manifest verification (sys.partitions counts are approximate — extract file is truth). WebServiceUsers excluded (live creds).

title: Phase 1: Repo + CI skeleton (Laravel 11 + MySQL 8 + React)
description: Scaffold per docs/09-architecture-deployment.md: Laravel 11 API app, MySQL 8, React control panel placeholder, CI pipeline, repo layout.
close_reason: Laravel 12 (not 11 — EOL security, see README deviation note) scaffolded in api/, GitHub Actions CI (pint + phpunit + conditional golden suite), panel/ stub, monorepo README.

title: DECISION: carry MCS Development into v2 as product/scope preset?
description: Open item from docs/12 + CLAUDE-NOTES: MCS-Dev is a complete dormant second package (PV28/VC19), revive = config/QA only. Decide whether v2 ships it as a scope preset.

title: DECISION: norm sample-size threshold + promotion policy sign-off
description: Open item from docs/06 + docs/12: confirm >=300-400/scale threshold and human-promotion policy for candidate->active norm sets. Needs Arnold sign-off.

title: Phase 8: pooled-v1 norms + docs polish
description: Derive pooled-v1 norms empirically from 16.7k historical sessions, impact report by rescoring history, publish docs per docs/06 + 00-INDEX build order step 8.

title: Phase 6: Norm analytics + versioned norm sets
description: Versioned norm sets (candidate/active/retired), norms param (male|female|pooled|<id>), drift analytics, new-language pipeline per docs/06-norms.md.

title: Phase 7: Control panel (React)
description: API key management, per-key stats/rate limits, under-the-hood self-documentation requirement, audit trace UI per docs/08-control-panel.md.

title: DECISION: rename GitHub repo + local folder off 'pro-d-scoring-engine'?
description: Repo/folder name 'pro-d-scoring-engine' bakes the PRO-D report name into the platform's top-level identity — same issue just corrected inside the codebase. Not done automatically: renaming the GitHub repo changes the remote URL (GitHub redirects, but existing local clones need updating), and beads' issue-id prefix (pro-d-scoring-engine-*) is derived from the repo name at init — renaming would need care to avoid breaking issue-id references already in git history/commit messages. Needs Arnold's call on both the new name and whether to re-key beads.
close_reason: Repo and local folder renamed to pro-logic-scoring-engine (remote confirmed: github.com/arnoldsmyth/pro-logic-scoring-engine). Beads issue-id prefix left as-is to avoid rewriting history.
